info.name: W3DS Login
info.summary: Cryptographic authentication via the W3DS protocol
info.description:
Enables passwordless login to Nextcloud using the W3DS decentralized identity protocol. Users authenticate by scanning a QR code with their eID wallet, which signs a session challenge using ECDSA P-256. No passwords are transmitted or stored.
Features: - QR code login on the Nextcloud login page - Auto-provisioning of new users on first authentication - Link/unlink W3DS identity from personal settings - Signature verification via the W3DS Registry
info.author: Patrick
